name: @irisrun/observe
description: Iris observability — OTel-shaped spans derived from a recorded session's inspection (root turn span + child effect spans + marker spans), with deterministic spanIds (sessionId#seq, no RNG) and timing from record.ts. Emitted to an injected Sink (collecting/console); real OTLP export is a manual smoke. Derived from the journal so replay determinism is unaffected. Deps @irisrun/core + @irisrun/inspect.
